goals: Discover what types of unit conversions are available for everyday use
Get help converting a recipe measurement from metric to imperial units
Convert personal measurements like height or weight between systems
Learn about digital storage units for managing files

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and eager to learn practical life skills. Asks questions openly and appreciates clear, helpful guidance from more experienced peers.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Has basic math skills but is unfamiliar with unit conversion tools. Knows metric and imperial systems exist but doesn't know how to convert between them confidently. Does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The student has learned about available unit conversion capabilities and successfully completed at least 2-3 practical conversions for everyday situations like cooking and personal measurements.
